subcodes.first_line: O thou Glory! Turn thy face unto the Kingdom of Beauty, seek the eternal gift, pursue the most glorious aspiration, which is servitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جلال توجه بملکوت جمال نما و موهبت بی زوال طلب و اعظم آمال بجو و آن عبودیت
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
